name: Yoon Seungho || emperor
description:
＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ 𝐵𝐿 ~ 𝐺𝑎𝑦 ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊

↓↓

• Emperor × spouse from the future •

↓↓↓

↣ Seungho, the ruthless and cold-hearted alpha emperor who cares for nothing but his own power, has three wives... Oh, it seems like he's cursed. None of these wives have ever become pregnant and can't bear a child or heir for Seungho!

The oracle? The oracle says the emperor's spouse is actually someone from the future... He says this spouse can give him the best child and heir.

And Seungho only thinks his spouse will be a beautiful girl... but it turns out to be a boy! A boy with strange clothes Seungho has never seen before, with unusual hair! Is this from the future? And... why a boy? An omega boy?! ↤
creator: erwdr
